description.p: Lumux is a lightweight desktop app that analyzes the colors on your screen and streams them to a Philips Hue Entertainment area for an "ambilight" effect.
It is designed for Wayland desktops and uses the XDG Desktop Portal ScreenCast API (PipeWire) so you control when and what Lumux can capture.

ul.li: Hue Entertainment streaming (DTLS) for smooth, low-latency updates
Portal-based screen capture on Wayland (no privileged access required)
Configurable zone grid and real-time zone preview
Performance controls (resolution scale, target FPS, smoothing, gamma/brightness)
Optional tray integration and quick start/stop controls

description.p: Requires a Philips Hue Bridge and an Entertainment area configured in the Hue app.

screenshot.caption: Main application window with zone preview

ul.li: Fixed Hue lights staying on after application or system shutdown
Fixed autostart toggle not persisting in Flatpak sandbox
Added SIGTERM signal handler for clean shutdown during system power off
Improved autostart file path detection in Flatpak environments
Added Reading Mode with configurable static color and brightness controls
Added automatic Reading Mode activation on startup
Improved Reading Mode responsiveness with debounced brightness updates and auto-apply behavior
Fixed autostart setup by creating the desktop entry directory automatically and handling Flatpak permission errors more gracefully
Added a capture source selector to sync either the entire screen or a single window
Improved capture cleanup so stopping sync also closes the active PipeWire portal session
Saved the selected capture source in settings so it persists across restarts
Added Bridge Setup Wizard with automatic discovery and authentication
Added black bar detection for letterbox/pillarbox video content
Replaced python-hue-v2 with unified BridgeClient for better reliability
Improved code structure and maintainability
Added autostart at login support for Flatpak
Fixed config persistence in Flatpak sandbox (now uses XDG_CONFIG_HOME)
Improved settings management for sandboxed environments

description.p: Initial release of Lumux for Philips Hue Sync.

ul.li: Hue Entertainment streaming with DTLS for smooth, low-latency light updates
Portal-based screen capture on Wayland using XDG Desktop Portal and PipeWire
Configurable zone grid with real-time preview
Performance controls including resolution scale, target FPS, smoothing, gamma, and brightness
System tray integration with quick start/stop controls
